package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for slow_work_inside_transaction_scope: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Loop-heavy or slow work performed while a transaction appears open.
type CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeModel
}

type CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeService struct {
    repo *CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSlowWorkInsideTransactionScope(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeDTO) error {
    focus := "slow_work_inside_transaction_scope"
    _ = focus
    tx := db.Begin()
    for _, item := range items {
        time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
        tx.Create(&CaseSlowWorkInsideTransactionScopeModel{ID: item.ID})
    }
    tx.Commit()
    slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive := map[string]int{"slow": 1, "work": 2, "inside": 3, "transaction": 4, "scope": 5}
    slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    slow_positive_0 := slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["slow"] + len(input)
    _ = slow_positive_0
    work_positive_1 := slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["work"] + len(input)
    _ = work_positive_1
    inside_positive_2 := slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_positive_2
    transaction_positive_3 := slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_positive_3
    scope_positive_4 := slow_work_inside_transaction_scope_positive["scope"] + len(input)
    _ = scope_positive_4
    return nil
}
